These elements, in the liquid crystal display, can control the light in a display, and can display a wide range of colors

there's some redirect between some actions. When i try to open the url /pressdownloads/downloads or just /pressdownloads it just goes to admin controller and i need to login in before acess the pressdownloads area. Why? The Auth Settings This issue might arise due to improper configuration of CakePHP authentication component within your AdminController or some global settings conflicting with this setup. Here is an example how you can set up admin routes and restrict them under the login: ```php Router::prefix('admin', array('actionPrefix' => 'admin')); Router::connect('/admin/users/login', array('controller' => 'users', 'action' => 'login'),array('pass')) // The prefix of your controller actions with Admin Router::connect('/admin/pressdownloads/:any', array('controller' => 'pressdownloads', 'action' => '$action', 'method' => array('get' => true, ))); ``` Then in the `Auth` component you set it to only allow logged-in users: ``` public $auth = array( 'userModel' => false, 'login' => '/admin/users/login', ); ``` You may need further customization according your needs. Make sure that routes are registered after security filter.

sement Attention, Los Angeles! ✨ Introducing Dr. Matthew R. Leibowitz - your dedicated HIV specialist at UCLA Center for Clinical AIDS Research and Education (CARE) ✈️ ‍⚕️ A Harvard graduate & Washington University medical school alumnus, now serving as a clinical instructor in medicine - Trained internally @ Deaconess Hospital Boston before returning to UCLA. - Completed Infectious Disease fellowship right here! Now, with NIAID and GlaxoSmithKline support, he's pursuing his PhD at the UCLA School of Public Health - focusing On HIV clinical epidemiology ⚕️ Dr. Leibowitz cares deeply for patients & specializes in: - Prognostic immunologic markers - Antiretroviral therapy strategies (even when drug resistance is present) Plus, he's got a keen interest in sexually transmitted disease education and treatment! ✉ Contact him today @ UCLA CARE Center to discuss your HIV care options *Consultation services available with Boehringer-Ingelheim.* [UCLA Center for Clinical AI

only Singtel reported in-line 9MFy17 results while Starhub and M1 missed expectations for its FY16 results. All three telcos reported decline in EBITDA, mainly due to intensifying business in Singapore, especially for the two telcos. Looking ahead, we believe with TPG expected to launch mobile services in CY18, competition within Singapore’s mobile industry is set to intensify as incumbents will likely take actions so as to gain market share during this period. We also expect TPG to start offering fibre broadband services before the launch of its mobile services.
